summary: High‑energy show with a blistering “Music Never Stopped” and a fun Neville Brothers cameo, recording quality not described but presumed adequate.
review: Reviewers rave about the ferocious pace of this December 30, 1986 performance – calling it possibly the fastest take of “Music Never Stopped” ever heard – and praise Jerry’s soaring guitar work that carries the band through a few lyrical hiccups from Bob. The second set even features a surprise guest spot by the Neville Brothers on “Cool Aiko” leading into “Man Smart.” No specific recording‑quality comments were made, so the audio is assumed to be listenable but unverified.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews are highly positive (4–5 stars) and focus on strong musical performance; lack of recording‑quality details keeps the rating from reaching the highest tier.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any audio issues, so recording quality cannot be assessed definitively.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Fast‑paced, high‑energy first and second sets with a guest appearance by the Neville Brothers; overall flow described as “fire on all cylinders.”

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for rising to the challenge and delivering delightful, soaring guitar takes during the fast rendition of “Music Never Stopped.”
band_member_comments.Bob: Noted that Bob (referred to as Bobby) struggled with lyrics on a couple of verses.
